channel.title: Pages on sanntid.org
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on sanntid.org

item.title: About
item.author: arnulf.heimsbakk@gmail.com (Arnulf Heimsbakk)
item.description: This blog is mostly updated with stuff I don’t want to forget. The content is configuration snippets or links for use at home. For more examples of what I do visit my GithHub page.
